title: Bay of Islands Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Bay of Islands, including activity discounts, campervan hires, and travel insurance, to make your holiday more affordable and.
intro: The Bay of Islands is a top destination for family holidays in New Zealand, with its beautiful beaches, dolphin watching cruises, and historic Waitangi Treaty Grounds. To make the most of your trip, we've rounded up the best current deals and discounts. With prices starting from $89/day for a family campervan and up to 40% off activities, you can have a fun and memorable holiday without breaking the bank.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in the Bay of Islands, including dolphin watching cruises and Cape Brett cruises. You can also find discounts on campervan hires from $89/day with Discover Cars. Additionally, Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings.

Cover-More travel insurance is also available from $4.50/day, providing comprehensive coverage for your family's trip.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Campervan hires from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
The Bay of Islands offers a range of activities that are great value for families. A dolphin watching cruise, which typically costs around $120 per person, can be booked for up to 40% off with Bookme.co.nz. The Waitangi Treaty Grounds, which costs around $50 per person, offers a discounted family pass for $120.

Other best-value activities include the Hole in the Rock cruise, which costs around $120 per person, and the Haruru Falls walk, which is free.

sections.heading: Paihia Accommodation Deals
sections.body: Paihia is the cheapest and most convenient base for a Bay of Islands family holiday — most cruises, the i-SITE and the Russell ferry all leave from here. In winter (June), accommodation is well below summer rates, and there's plenty of availability without booking months ahead. Holiday parks like the Paihia Top 10 offer cabins and self-contained family units with shared pools and playgrounds, while motels with kitchenettes along Marsden Road suit families who want to self-cater. Look for free-cancellation rates on Booking.com so you can lock in a price and adjust if plans change, and consider a unit slightly back from the waterfront for the best value.
list: Holiday park cabins and units — best value with pools and playgrounds included
Self-catering motels on Marsden Road — kitchenettes cut food costs
June rates well below summer; easy availability
Book free-cancellation rates to stay flexible

sections.heading: Ferry Pass & Waitangi Family Rate Value
sections.body:
The single best-value outing in the bay is the Paihia–Russell passenger ferry. A return crossing costs only a few dollars per person with discounted child fares, and frequent-traveller multi-trip passes drop the per-trip cost further if you plan to cross more than once. It's a cheap way to add a whole extra day of sightseeing in historic Russell.

For the Waitangi Treaty Grounds, skip individual adult tickets and ask for the family pass — it bundles two adults and accompanying children at a meaningful discount, and your ticket usually includes a guided tour and cultural performance, so it's a full half-day of value. Under-5s typically enter free.
list: Paihia–Russell ferry — only a few dollars; multi-trip passes save more
Waitangi Treaty Grounds family pass — cheaper than separate adult tickets
Waitangi ticket usually includes a guided tour and cultural performance

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in the Bay of Islands, here are some money-saving tips. Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. Secondly, consider hiring a campervan instead of booking separate accommodation and transportation.

Thirdly, pack your own food and snacks instead of eating out for every meal. Fourthly, take advantage of free activities such as the Haruru Falls walk and the Waitangi Beach.

Fifthly, book your travel insurance in advance to get the best price. Lastly, consider visiting during the off-season to get cheaper prices for activities and accommodation.
list: Book activities and accommodation in advance
Hire a campervan instead of separate accommodation and transportation
Pack your own food and snacks
